dashboard.label: Unknown MITRE Coverage
dashboard.description: Identify Suricata alert signatures that are not yet mapped to MITRE ATT&CK so the lookup can be improved.

search.query: | inputlookup suricata_settings.csv | stats latest(eval(if(setting="search_scope", value, null()))) as search_scope latest(eval(if(setting="time_choice", value, null()))) as time_choice | eval search_scope=coalesce(search_scope, "index=suricata") | eval time_choice=coalesce(time_choice, "24h") | eval earliest_tok=case(time_choice=="7d", "-7d@d", time_choice=="30d", "-30d@d", time_choice=="all", "0", true(), "-24h@h") | eval latest_tok="now"

$search_scope$ event_type=alert | eval signature=coalesce(signature, 'alert.signature') | lookup suricata_mitre signature OUTPUT technique_id | where isnull(technique_id) | stats count as unknown_alerts

$search_scope$ event_type=alert | eval signature=coalesce(signature, 'alert.signature') | lookup suricata_mitre signature OUTPUT technique_id | where isnull(technique_id) | stats dc(signature) as unknown_signatures

$search_scope$ event_type=alert | eval signature=coalesce(signature, 'alert.signature') | lookup suricata_mitre signature OUTPUT technique_id | where isnull(technique_id) | stats count as alert_count values(alert.category) as categories values(alert.severity) as severities by signature | sort - alert_count | head 25

$search_scope$ event_type=alert | eval signature=coalesce(signature, 'alert.signature') | lookup suricata_mitre signature OUTPUT technique_id | where isnull(technique_id) | timechart span=1d count as unknown_alerts

$search_scope$ event_type=alert | eval signature=coalesce(signature, 'alert.signature') | lookup suricata_mitre signature OUTPUT technique_id | where isnull(technique_id) | eval severity=coalesce('alert.severity', severity) | stats count by severity | sort severity
